title: carex atrofusca subsp. coriophora
intro: Carex atrofusca subsp. coriophora, also known as dark-green sedge, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Cyperaceae. Traditionally, dark-green sedge has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to provide health benefits like reducing inflammation, alleviating congestion, and promoting healthy digestion. Dark-green sedge can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions to utilize its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully confirm its efficacy and safety.
